Executives

Meet the leadership team driving eTrove's vision and innovation.

Minjae Sung

Founder, Chairman & CEO

Minjae is the founder, chairman, and CEO of eTrove. He launched eTrove (now SwapDoor) in 2025 and continues to steer the company's vision and product strategy. He holds a B.S. in Economics from the University of California, San Diego.

Milan Rona

Co-founder & CTO

Milan Rona is the Co-founder and CTO of eTrove, where he leads backend development, focusing on authentication, notifications, and overall platform performance. Joined early in the project to help eTrove scale quickly and securely.

Our leadership team combines deep industry expertise with innovative thinking to drive eTrove's mission forward. Together, we're building the future of business solutions.
